name: Jon Berti
transactions: June 5, 2008:Drafted by theOakland Athleticsin the36th roundof the 2008 amateur draft, but did not sign.
June 7, 2011:Drafted by theToronto Blue Jaysin the18th roundof the 2011 amateur draft. Player signed June 12, 2011.
January 12, 2018:Signed as a Free Agent with theToronto Blue Jays.
April 21, 2018:Purchased by theCleveland Indiansfrom theToronto Blue Jays.
June 7, 2018:Purchased by theToronto Blue Jaysfrom theCleveland Indians.
December 3, 2018:Signed as a Free Agent with theMiami Marlins.

March 27, 2024:Traded as part of a 3-team trade by theMiami Marlinsto theNew York Yankees.  TheNew York YankeessentBen Rortvedtto theTampa Bay Rays.  TheNew York YankeessentJohn Cruz(minors) to theMiami Marlins.  TheTampa Bay RayssentShane Sasaki(minors) to theMiami Marlins.
January 28, 2025:Signed as a Free Agent with theChicago Cubs.
